name: mozi
description: Codex plugin for an end-to-end NPU operator development harness, currently initializing the AddRelu PRD stub.

interface.shortDescription: Initialize AddRelu PRD stubs for NPU operator harness work.
interface.longDescription: Mozi is a Codex plugin for an end-to-end NPU operator development harness. The current workflow provides $mozi:create-prd to initialize an empty AddRelu PRD stub at docs/mozi/addrelu/prd.md without expanding requirements.
defaultPrompt: Use $mozi:create-prd to initialize the AddRelu PRD stub.
Create the empty AddRelu PRD file for the NPU harness workflow.
Prepare the Mozi AddRelu PRD stub without filling requirements.
